title: GeoFlag
description:
Coming July 13, 2026OUT NOWA quiet, beautiful geography game for the curious.

Об игреA geography game for quiet curiosity. 

• All 193 UN member countries. Five ways to play.

• A single, cohesive living world. Cozy by design.

• For the quietly curious, the armchair traveler, the parent and child sharing a globe.

STUDY A LIVING GLOBE.Study Mode is a navigable 3D globe you can spin and explore. Pick a region, fly in, and tap any country to learn its flag, capital, language, currency, and a natural wonder. Switch between a photoreal satellite Earth and a clean classic map. The more you learn, the more your world is revealed. No scoring, no timer, just you and the planet.

FROM ORBIT TO THE MAP.Every Map Game round begins on the globe, then the camera dives down onto a real, photoreal Earth where you place flags onto the right countries. Regional levels build toward the whole world, with US States as a bonus and a Hardcore mode that adds the micro-states most people miss. Earn stars. Unlock new expeditions.

ONE MORE RUN.Endless Expedition is a single run that lasts as long as you can keep going. Flags come one after another. You have three lanterns, and a wrong answer costs you one. The further you go, the deeper and rarer the world becomes. The only question that matters is how far you can chart.

A NEW EXPEDITION EVERY DAY.Ten countries, one fresh puzzle, the same challenge for every player worldwide. Build your streak, beat your time, come back tomorrow. Chain correct answers and your combo builds across every mode. 

MORE WAYS TO PLAY WITH FLAGS.Geo Cards turns flags into quick, lighter sessions. Match flag pairs from memory, perfect for shorter breaks.

A HOME OF YOUR OWN.Every achievement is a magnet on the door of your own cozy room. Earn 

one and it lights up in color, while the ones still ahead of you wait 

in gray. The room fills in as you go, and a guide by your side quietly 

points you toward whatever you are closest to earning next. Twenty-five 

achievements to find, and for the first time, they unlock on your Steam 

profile too.

BUILT FOR CRAFT, NOT GRIND• All 193 UN member countries, with more study content on the way

• Stars, achievements, and explorer tiers

• 25 achievements, a home that fills in as you earn them, and real Steam achievement support

• A combo system that rewards getting into a rhythm

• Save progress per level, come back whenever life lets you

• Single-player, no ads, no microtransactions
 
 
The world is bigger than you think. GeoFlag is here to help you see more of it. 
 

Built with care by a solo developer. Tested daily by his two daughters. Made for the curious, the wandering, and anyone who still gets a small thrill from finding a country they didn't know existed.
description_short: A geography game for the curious. Spin a living 3D globe, place flags on a photoreal Earth, and race a daily challenge. Five ways to play across all 193 countries.
